docs.title: Welcome to Endale
docs.text:
A campaign wiki for Daggerheart

This wiki serves as the living reference for the world of Endale — covering lore, characters, factions, locations, and the unfolding story of the campaign.

docs.title: Quick Navigation
docs.text: Section Contents World History, geography, and cosmology Locations Cities, ruins, regions, and points of interest Characters NPCs and player characters Factions Powers, guilds, and organisations Story Active plot threads and campaign arcs Sessions Session logs and recaps Lore & Culture Religions, languages, customs, and history

docs.title: About This Wiki
docs.text:
Player & GM Sections

Pages marked [GM] contain information beyond what the players currently know. These are kept in private notes and not published to the public site.

docs.title: Player Characters
docs.text: See Player Characters for the full party roster.

docs.title: NPCs
docs.text: Add NPC pages to this section as they are established.

docs.text: Organise locations under their region as they are established.

docs.title: Location Template
docs.text:
When adding a new location, use this structure:

# Location Name
**Type:** City / Dungeon / Wilderness / etc.
**Region:**
**Status:** Active / Ruined / Unknown

docs.title: Lore & Culture
docs.text: Deep background on the world — religion, language, customs, magic, and history.

docs.title: Sections
docs.text:
Add sub-pages as lore accumulates. Suggested topics:

  • Religions & Faiths
  • Languages & Writing Systems
  • Magic — how it works, who uses it, social attitudes
  • Economy & Trade
  • Law & Governance
  • Notable Legends & Myths
  • Calendar & Time

docs.title: Session Logs
docs.text: A record of each session, used to track what happened and carry continuity forward.

docs.title: Session Template
docs.text:
# Session N — Title
**Date Played:**
**In-World Date:**
**Location(s):**
**Players Present:**

## Summary
## Key Events
## Decisions Made
## New Information Learned
## Threads Opened / Closed
## XP / Rewards
## Cliffhanger / Next Session Setup

docs.title: Log
docs.text: Session Title Date Played Summary

docs.title: Campaign Overview
docs.text: High-level summary of the campaign's central conflict and trajectory.

docs.title: Sections
docs.text:
• Active Threads — Current plot lines in motion
  • Arcs — Broader story arcs and their status

docs.title: Story State
docs.text: Element Status Current Arc Session Count Party Location Immediate Goal Looming Threat

docs.title: Campaign Arcs
docs.text: Arcs are the major chapters of the campaign story.

docs.title: Arc Template
docs.text:
# Arc Name
**Status:** Current / Completed / Upcoming
**Sessions:** X–Y

## Overview
## Central Conflict
## Threads in This Arc
## Key Events
## Resolution (if completed)

docs.title: Active Plot Threads
docs.text: Threads are individual story lines currently in motion. They may be active, dormant, or resolved.

docs.title: Thread Template
docs.text:
## Thread Name
**Status:** Active / Dormant / Resolved
**Arc:** (which arc this belongs to)
**Key NPCs:**
**Key Locations:**

### Open Questions
